resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def isSubstringPresent(self, s: str) -> bool:
        for i in range(len(s) - 1):
            if s[i] == s[i + 1] and s[i] in s[s.rfind(s[i]) + 1:]:
                return True
        return False
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates over the string once, checking each character and its next one. If they are the same and appear together in the rest of the string, it returns True. This approach has a high efficiency due to its linear time complexity and constant space complexity.
